body_txt: Someone or something that has a short natural lifespan. This often varies depending on the work, but the lifespan is generally much shorter than most of the cast. Extreme cases can show the character undergoing Rapid Aging in a matter of minutes or seconds. For something to qualify as this trope, they need to have an abnormally short lifespan compared to most of the characters in the work, and they must be naturally short-lived, without any acquired curses or effects that shorten their lifespan. This trope is often presented in one of two ways: Compare We Are as Mayflies , where humans are this trope to other intelligent races. Compare with Rapid Aging , where an entity ages quickly but very often due to non-natural factors. Proportional Aging may or may not be involved. Opposite of Long-Lived .
